caption: A man wearing a grey, spiked wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. Behind him is a wall featuring numerous framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a white shirt. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left reads "THE STUDIO PODCAST" and another on the right says "GOSS TALK JOY". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, gesturing with his right hand and slightly shifting his posture while maintaining his position in front of the microphone. The background remains static throughout the sequence, and the lighting stays consistent as he speaks.
